description: const.py defines slow-cadence intervals, screener rotation list, ipo view rotation list, PLATFORMS includes event+calendar
coordinator.py (fast) polls all 10 fast-tier tools including market_health, institutional_activity, conviction, bounce_signals
coordinator_slow.py exists and polls all 14 slow-tier tools with screener/ipo rotation
steps: Confirm 14 tool calls incl rotation logic

description: __init__.py creates one shared TraderDaddy client, injects into both coordinators, stores dict in hass.data, registers hedge_analysis service
entity.py supports both fast and slow coordinator entities
steps: Confirm base class(es) work for both coordinator types

description: sensor.py exposes new fast-tier sensors: market_health, institutional_activity, conviction_market, bounce_signal_top
steps: Confirm 4 new fast sensor descriptions with correct field names from types.py

description: sensor.py exposes new slow-tier sensors: screener rotation, strategy_ideas, edge_xray, gex_ticker, apex_levels, bounce_score, conviction_symbol, long_term_quality, politician_trades, politician_trades_by_ticker, dividend_calendar, ipo_scanner
steps: Confirm 12 new slow sensor descriptions with correct field names

description: binary_sensor.py adds gamma_flip, elevated_risk, bounce_signal, high_conviction alongside existing legendary_print
event.py new platform fires td_new_print, td_new_politician_trade, td_new_ipo_listing, td_earnings_approaching, deduping on seen ids
steps: Confirm 4 event entities with dedup/seen-id tracking

description: calendar.py new platform exposes economic_calendar, earnings_flow, dividend_calendar as HA CalendarEntity
services.yaml documents traderdaddy.hedge_analysis with symbol/shares/basis/atr fields
steps: Confirm schema matches SDK method signature

description: www/traderdaddy-vitals-card.js is a vanilla-JS no-build custom Lovelace card rendering sentiment/top-flow/gamma-bias in a dark glassmorphism style
steps: Confirm no build tooling required, defines customElements.define

description: www/preview.html loads the card with mock data matching real sensor attribute shapes, renders standalone
steps: Confirm card renders with no console errors

description: Playwright captures docs/screenshot-card.png from www/preview.html
steps: Confirm docs/screenshot-card.png exists and is non-trivial size

description: docs/GRAFANA.md + docs/grafana-dashboard.json ship an InfluxDB recipe and importable dashboard for long-term trend
Every .py file in custom_components/traderdaddy passes python3 -m py_compile
strings.json, translations/en.json, manifest.json, services.yaml, docs/grafana-dashboard.json all parse as valid JSON/YAML
No sensor/binary_sensor/event/calendar calls the SDK directly — all read from coordinator.data (CLAUDE.md's core rule)
README.md documents every entity (sensor/binary_sensor/event/calendar) and the new service, embeds the screenshot
steps: Confirm entity table covers all new entities

description: CLAUDE.md updated to describe the two-coordinator/shared-client architecture
steps: Confirm 'one rule' section reflects fast+slow coordinators

description: git diff --name-only shows changes confined to custom_components/traderdaddy, www/, docs/, README.md, CLAUDE.md, SPEC.md, feature_list.json, FINDINGS.md, STATUS.md
steps: Confirm no files outside expected scope
